top_signals.title: Binance’s Yi He warns of alleged impersonation scam, CoinUp denies ties
top_signals.summary: Binance co-founder Yi He warns of an alleged impersonator referred to as “Zhu Pan” in Chinese-language posts as CoinUp distances itself from the individual.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hut 8 agrees to $2.35 million settlement in investor suit tied to US Bitcoin merger
top_signals.summary: Hut 8 agreed to pay $2.35M to settle a securities class action over disclosure claims from its 2023 merger with U.S. Bitcoin Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Real Madrid commit to EuroLeague basketball amid NBA interest after €3bn proposal
top_signals.summary: EuroLeague basketball chiefs have secured a renewed commitment from Real Madrid in the face of rival interest from the NBA after wooing teams with a €3bn package. Real Madrid are understood to have signed a new 10-year deal with EuroLeague in a move that is set to be rubber-stamped later this week. It comes just [...]
